== Notes for [[Item:Q101911|Q101911]] ==

==Jakob Wyss==

* Birth: April 11, 1549 in Weisslingen, Pfäffikon ZH, CH

==Spouse==

* Married: Adelheid Joehr in 1537 in Weisslingen, Pfäffikon, ZH, CH. Adelheid Joehr (daughter of Mr. Joehr) 450 was born Abt. 1516 in of, Weisslingen, ... More About Adelheid Joehr and Jakob Wyss: Marriage: 1537, Weisslingen, ... genealogy.com. genealogy.com Adelheid Joehr (b. Abt. 1516, d. date unknown)

==Children==

* '''Ottilia Wyss;''' born 25 Jan 1538 in Weisslingen, Pfäffikon, ZH, CH
* '''Matthew Wyss;''' born 17 Nov 1539 in Weisslingen, Pfäffikon, ZH, CH
* '''Jakob Wyss;''' born 11 Apr 1549 in Weisslingen, Pfäffikon, ZH, CH), married to Magdalena Spörri, Occupation: Zimmermann

==Sources==

* Zurich: church and civil status books, household toboggan of the canton of Zurich, page: EIII 138.1 p.564
* Zurich: church and civil status books, household toboggan of the canton of Zurich, page: EIII 138.1 p.29, 125

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD93DAFD1EFBBFA9822EF79916CDFBB
geni:6000000044165564900

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
